title: Fox Corp. Quarterly Revenue Up 9% To $4.4 Billion, Beating Forecasts On Sports, Tubi, Fox Network Pricing
text: Fox Corp. reported sales of $4.4 billion in its fiscal second quarter, up 9% from the year before, beating Wall Street forecasts and citing sports, Fox Network pricing and Tubi.
